prompt: Read retrieval_roadmap.md and IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md, then audit the project against the roadmap. Report: (1) which roadmap items are implemented, (2) which are missing, (3) any obvious gaps between docs and code. Use list_files/read_file for the audit. Do not modify code.
summary: Use a read-then-write plan for: Read retrieval_roadmap.md and IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md, then audit the project against the roadmap. Report: (1) which roadmap items are implemented, (2) which are missing, (3) any ob. Prefer narrow file inspection, minimal churn, and explicit verification.

steps.title: Survey the workspace
steps.objective: Identify the repo areas and files most relevant to the task.

steps.title: Inspect the critical implementation details
steps.objective: Read the narrowest set of files needed to confirm the current behavior.

steps.title: Apply the smallest coherent code change
steps.objective: Implement the feature or fix with minimal unrelated churn.

steps.title: Verify the result
steps.objective: Check the final state, run the relevant validation, and confirm completion honestly.
